bird.name: Masked antpitta
bird.summary: The masked antpitta (Hylopezus auricularis) is a Vulnerable species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is endemic to Bolivia.

locations.name: 里韋拉爾塔
locations.summary: 里韋拉爾塔（西班牙語：Riberalta）是玻利維亞的城鎮，由貝尼省負責管轄，位於該國北部貝尼河畔，距離首府特立尼達445公里，面積20.1平方公里，海拔高度130米，每年平均降雨量1,740毫米，2006年人口78,100。 外部連結…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Masked antpitta
relations.evidence: Most records are from near the town of Riberalta in northern Beni on the Pando border. It apparently once occupied a larger area. It inhabits secondary forest filled with dense tangled vegetation as around the edges of open areas; it apparently favors muddy areas
